pieces.label: Cityscape I — starlit skyline with layered block towers
pieces.note: First city: a starfield (░ gradient sky dotted with ✦ stars) above a dense skyline rendered in ▒/▓/█ shaded blocks, fading into a solid ground mass. Produced in response to 'hello! show me a city'.

pieces.label: Cityscape II — stepped ziggurat towers over water
pieces.note: Second city: a sparse star sky over a symmetrical terraced/ziggurat skyline built from box-drawing characters (╭───┤ stepped towers framing a central ◈-windowed spire), grounded on ▓ blocks with rippling water (≈ ∿ ~) at the base. Produced in response to 'show me another city'.

pieces.label: Cityscape III — central pyramid flanked by windowed towers, with shoreline
pieces.note: Third city: a constellation sky over a large central pyramid/mountain (╱█╲ triangle) flanked by ╔═══╗ towers with □ window grids, set on solid ground above ═ / ─ shoreline rules and ▒/░ water bands. Produced in response to 'nice! lets see one more city'.

missed_or_ambiguous: Clean thread: exactly three assistant messages (MSG 2, 4, 6), each containing one complete whole-message ASCII cityscape (mode full). No fragments span multiple messages, no message holds multiple distinct pieces, and no duplicate re-renders. The three form one evolving themed sequence (sequence_group 'cities'), driven by the user's successive 'another city' / 'one more city' prompts; each grows more architecturally detailed than the last. Matches the header's already_extracted_pieces: 3.
